title: Spectrum Slots
description: Clean colored underlines for rare and special items — instantly spot loot at a glance
body:
---

# 🎨 ColorCoded

A lightweight resource pack that adds **colored underlines** to special and rare items. Instantly recognize golden apples, dragon drops, skulls, and more while keeping Minecraft’s clean vanilla look.

---

## ✨ Features

* **Category Highlights** – Rare and unique items get a subtle colored underline.
* **Vanilla-Friendly** – Blends naturally with the default textures.
* **Quick Recognition** – Spot trophies, consumables, and loot at a glance.
* **Inventory Clarity** – Perfect for survival and PvP, where speed matters.

---

## 🖼️ Preview

*![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54a9bc027306e421a3b47b7494c9924ee1ef4e20.png)*

---

## 🧩 Compatibility

This pack overrides the item models of select items (golden apples, skulls, dragon egg, etc.).
It will look out of place if combined with heavily stylized or non-vanilla packs.

✔ Compatible with **1.14 → 1.21.x** 
✖ Not supported on versions older than 1.14

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the `.zip` file.
2. Place it in your `resourcepacks` folder.
3. Activate it in the Minecraft Resource Packs menu.

---

### Pack Icon Idea

For `pack.png`:

* Minimal style → **just a colored underline bar on a dark background**.
* More illustrative → **a golden apple with the underline**.
* Stylish → **a rainbow underline bar fading across the bottom**.
